name: AI provenance manifest: emitter attaches the manifest path to the commit via `git notes add` under the refs/notes/provenance namespace
command: git init -q . && git config user.email t@t && git config user.name t && echo x > f && git add f && git commit -q -m "feat: x" && sha=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/provenance-emit.sh" --commit-sha $sha --git-notes && git notes --ref=refs/notes/provenance show $sha 2>note.out && grep "provenance" note.out 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
